all.en: This report documents the shipment delay affecting order number eight nine four two.
all.zh: 本報告記錄影響訂單編號 8942 的出貨延誤事件。

all.en: The order was scheduled to depart our Kaohsiung warehouse on May second.
all.zh: 本訂單原訂於五月二日自高雄倉庫出貨。

all.en: Actual departure occurred forty two hours later than the planned time.
all.zh: 實際出發時間較原計畫晚了四十二小時。

all.en: The customer is a key account with a strict service level agreement.
all.zh: 該客戶為重要客戶且簽有嚴格的服務水準協議。

all.en: The initial alert was raised by the customer service team on May third.
all.zh: 首次警示由客服團隊於五月三日提出。

all.en: Investigation began immediately under the standard incident protocol.
all.zh: 調查依標準事件處理程序立即展開。

all.en: The root cause was traced to a data error in the shipping manifest.
all.zh: 根本原因追溯為出貨提單上的資料錯誤。

all.en: The wrong destination code was entered during the booking step.
all.zh: 於訂艙步驟輸入了錯誤的目的地代碼。

all.en: As a result, the carrier rejected the pickup at the first attempt.
all.zh: 結果業者在首次取貨時拒絕收件。

all.en: The error was not detected until the next morning shift began work.
all.zh: 該錯誤直到次日早班開始工作時才被發現。

all.en: A corrected manifest was issued and the pickup was rescheduled.
all.zh: 更正後的提單已重新核發並重訂取貨時程。

all.en: The shipment finally departed late on the evening of May fourth.
all.zh: 該批貨於五月四日傍晚較晚時段終於出發。

all.en: Expedited transport was arranged at our cost to recover some lost time.
all.zh: 已由本公司支付加急運輸費用以挽回部分損失時間。

all.en: Final delivery reached the customer on May seventh, one day late.
all.zh: 最終於五月七日送達客戶手中，較預定遲一日。

all.en: The customer was notified proactively at every stage of the incident.
all.zh: 事件各階段均主動通知客戶。

all.en: A formal apology letter was sent by the regional account manager.
all.zh: 區域客戶經理已寄出正式道歉函。

all.en: The additional expedited freight cost totaled four hundred eighty dollars.
all.zh: 額外加急運費總計四百八十美元。

all.en: No physical damage to the goods occurred during the delay.
all.zh: 延誤期間貨品未發生任何實體損壞。

all.en: Corrective actions include a system check on destination code entry.
all.zh: 矯正措施包含對目的地代碼輸入進行系統檢查。

all.en: A dropdown selection will replace free text entry for this field.
all.zh: 本欄位將以下拉選單取代自由輸入文字。

all.en: A second review step has been added before manifests are released.
all.zh: 於提單發送前已新增第二道複核步驟。

all.en: The shipping team will receive refresher training within ten days.
all.zh: 出貨團隊將於十日內接受複訓。

all.en: Effectiveness of the changes will be reviewed after sixty days.
all.zh: 變更的有效性將於六十日後檢討。

all.en: This report has been shared with operations, sales, and quality teams.
all.zh: 本報告已分享予營運、業務與品質團隊。

all.en: We remain committed to restoring full confidence with this important customer.
all.zh: 我們將持續努力以重建這位重要客戶的完整信賴。

all.en: A follow up call has been scheduled with the customer for next Monday morning.
all.zh: 已安排下週一上午與客戶進行後續會談。

all.en: Goodwill credit equivalent to one percent of monthly revenue will be applied.
all.zh: 將給予相當於月營收百分之一的善意折抵。

all.en: Lessons learned from this incident will be added to our onboarding curriculum.
all.zh: 本事件所學將納入新進人員訓練課程。

all.en: Similar destination code controls will be deployed across all regional warehouses.
all.zh: 類似的目的地代碼管控將部署至所有區域倉庫。

all.en: An automated audit will compare every manifest against the order header daily.
all.zh: 自動稽核將每日比對每張提單與訂單抬頭。

all.en: Discrepancies will trigger holds until resolved by the dispatch supervisor.
all.zh: 差異將觸發暫扣，直至調度主管完成處置。

all.en: Carrier rejection notifications will be routed to an after hours response queue.
all.zh: 業者拒收通知將導入非辦公時段回應佇列。

all.en: Internal stakeholders will receive a monthly trend report on near miss incidents.
all.zh: 內部相關方將收到每月近未遂事件趨勢報告。

all.en: Closure of this incident is targeted for the end of the current fiscal quarter.
all.zh: 本事件預定於本會計季結束前完成結案。

all.en: Sincere thanks to the cross functional team that resolved this matter promptly.
all.zh: 由衷感謝迅速處置本案的跨職能團隊。

all.en: Detailed timeline reconstruction has been added to the incident management database.
all.zh: 詳細時序重建已加入事件管理資料庫。

all.en: Communications template revisions ensure customer notifications go out within one hour.
all.zh: 通訊範本修訂確保客戶通知於一小時內發出。

all.en: Service recovery training will be offered to all customer service representatives.
all.zh: 服務復原訓練將提供予所有客服代表。

all.en: A monthly governance review will track all open corrective action items to closure.
all.zh: 每月治理檢視會議將追蹤所有未結矯正措施直至結案。

all.en: Process flow diagrams are being updated to reflect the new validation steps.
all.zh: 流程圖正更新以反映新增的驗證步驟。

all.en: Pilot testing of the dropdown control begins in three regional warehouses next week.
all.zh: 下拉選單管控的試行測試將於下週於三個區域倉庫啟動。

all.en: Success criteria require zero destination errors over a thirty day measurement window.
all.zh: 成功標準要求三十天觀察期內零目的地錯誤。

all.en: If pilot results meet targets, global rollout will proceed during the following quarter.
all.zh: 若試行結果達標，下一季將進行全球推行。

all.en: Carrier service representatives have been briefed about the new validation workflow.
all.zh: 業者客戶代表已就新版驗證工作流程接受簡報。

all.en: Customer satisfaction surveys will measure perceived improvements over the next six months.
all.zh: 客戶滿意度調查將於未來六個月衡量感受到的改善情形。
